def format_user(user):
    return f"{user.name} <{user.email}>"

def calculate_total(items):
    return sum(item.price * item.qty for item in items)

def get_display_name(record):
    return f"{record.first_name} {record.last_name}"

def parse_settings(raw_text):
    return json.loads(raw_text)

def update_user_access(user):
    user.last_accessed = datetime.utcnow()
    db.session.add(user)
    db.session.commit()

def record_total_calculation(total):
    audit_log.record("total_calculated", total=total)

def build_header(user):
    token = jwt.encode({"sub": user.id}, SECRET_KEY)
    return {"Authorization": f"Bearer {token}"}
